<!--
  Thanks for contributing! Fill out the sections below — short, focused PRs
  get reviewed first.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/build/tooling

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #456" -->

## How was this tested?

- [ ] New unit tests
- [ ] New integration tests
- [ ] Existing tests cover the change
- [ ] Manually verified locally — describe how:

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (`ruff check`, `ruff format --check`)
- [ ] I have added type hints on new public functions
- [ ] I have added docstrings on new public functions
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally with coverage at or above the project threshold
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where relevant
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or credentials

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to. -->
